testcase.name: 微服務 Pod 成功啟動 - Example #1.1

微服務資源使用量在合理範圍 - Example #1.1

failure.message: [memory MiB] Expecting actual: 525 to be less than: 512

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: [memory MiB] Expecting actual: 525 to be less than: 512 at com.presit.steps.ApplicationIntegrationSteps.memBelow(ApplicationIntegrationSteps.java:141) at ✽.記憶體使用量應低於 512 MB(classpath:features/application/02_application_layer.feature:37)

failure.message: [memory MiB] Expecting actual: 523 to be less than: 512

testcase.name: 微服務資源使用量在合理範圍 - Example #1.3
微服務資源使用量在合理範圍 - Example #1.4
微服務健康檢查端點回應正常 - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: 假設Kind 集群 "pre-sit" 命名空間中所有 Pod 狀態為 Running.................................passed 並且Phase 1 數據庫層驗證已通過.........................................................passed 當我對 "http://customers-service.pre-sit.svc:8081/actuator/health" 發送 GET 請求...passed 那麼HTTP 狀態碼應為 200............................................................passed 並且回應 JSON 的 "status" 欄位應為 "UP"..............................................passed

testcase.name: 微服務健康檢查端點回應正常 - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: 假設Kind 集群 "pre-sit" 命名空間中所有 Pod 狀態為 Running.................................passed 並且Phase 1 數據庫層驗證已通過.........................................................passed 當我對 "http://vets-service.pre-sit.svc:8083/actuator/health" 發送 GET 請求........passed 那麼HTTP 狀態碼應為 200............................................................passed 並且回應 JSON 的 "status" 欄位應為 "UP"..............................................passed

testcase.name: 微服務健康檢查端點回應正常 - Example #1.3
testcase.system-out: 假設Kind 集群 "pre-sit" 命名空間中所有 Pod 狀態為 Running.................................passed 並且Phase 1 數據庫層驗證已通過.........................................................passed 當我對 "http://visits-service.pre-sit.svc:8082/actuator/health" 發送 GET 請求......passed 那麼HTTP 狀態碼應為 200............................................................passed 並且回應 JSON 的 "status" 欄位應為 "UP"..............................................passed

testcase.name: 微服務健康檢查端點回應正常 - Example #1.4
testcase.system-out: 假設Kind 集群 "pre-sit" 命名空間中所有 Pod 狀態為 Running.................................passed 並且Phase 1 數據庫層驗證已通過.........................................................passed 當我對 "http://api-gateway.pre-sit.svc:8080/actuator/health" 發送 GET 請求.........passed 那麼HTTP 狀態碼應為 200............................................................passed 並且回應 JSON 的 "status" 欄位應為 "UP"..............................................passed

testcase.name: 微服務數據庫健康指標正常 - Example #1.1
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: [JSON components.db.status] expected: "UP" but was: null at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.java:77) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.java:45) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstanceWithCaller(Constructor.java:500) at com.presit.steps.ApplicationIntegrationSteps.jsonFieldShouldBe(ApplicationIntegrationSteps.java:174) at com.presit.steps.ApplicationIntegrationSteps.jsonFieldShouldBe2(ApplicationIntegrationSteps.java:179) at ✽.回應 JSON 中 "components.db.status" 應為 "UP"(classpath:features/application/02_application_layer.feature:63)
testcase.system-out: 假設Kind 集群 "pre-sit" 命名空間中所有 Pod 狀態為 Running.................................passed 並且Phase 1 數據庫層驗證已通過.........................................................passed 當我對 "http://customers-service.pre-sit.svc:8081/actuator/health" 發送 GET 請求...passed 那麼回應 JSON 中 "components.db.status" 應為 "UP"..................................failed 並且回應 JSON 中 "components.db.details.database" 應為 "PostgreSQL"................skipped

testcase.name: 微服務數據庫健康指標正常 - Example #1.2
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: [JSON components.db.status] expected: "UP" but was: null at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.java:77) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.java:45) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstanceWithCaller(Constructor.java:500) at com.presit.steps.ApplicationIntegrationSteps.jsonFieldShouldBe(ApplicationIntegrationSteps.java:174) at com.presit.steps.ApplicationIntegrationSteps.jsonFieldShouldBe2(ApplicationIntegrationSteps.java:179) at ✽.回應 JSON 中 "components.db.status" 應為 "UP"(classpath:features/application/02_application_layer.feature:63)
testcase.system-out: 假設Kind 集群 "pre-sit" 命名空間中所有 Pod 狀態為 Running.................................passed 並且Phase 1 數據庫層驗證已通過.........................................................passed 當我對 "http://vets-service.pre-sit.svc:8083/actuator/health" 發送 GET 請求........passed 那麼回應 JSON 中 "components.db.status" 應為 "UP"..................................failed 並且回應 JSON 中 "components.db.details.database" 應為 "PostgreSQL"................skipped

testcase.name: 微服務數據庫健康指標正常 - Example #1.3
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: [JSON components.db.status] expected: "UP" but was: null at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.java:77) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.java:45) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstanceWithCaller(Constructor.java:500) at com.presit.steps.ApplicationIntegrationSteps.jsonFieldShouldBe(ApplicationIntegrationSteps.java:174) at com.presit.steps.ApplicationIntegrationSteps.jsonFieldShouldBe2(ApplicationIntegrationSteps.java:179) at ✽.回應 JSON 中 "components.db.status" 應為 "UP"(classpath:features/application/02_application_layer.feature:63)

testcase.name: 連線池初始化成功且參數正確 - Example #1.1
連線池初始化成功且參數正確 - Example #1.2
連線池初始化成功且參數正確 - Example #1.3
啟動日誌中不包含錯誤 - Example #1.1
啟動日誌中不包含錯誤 - Example #1.2
啟動日誌中不包含錯誤 - Example #1.3

failure.message:
[logs (steady state) 不應含 'Connection refused'] Expecting actual: " at io.netty.channel.epoll.EpollEventLoop.run(EpollEventLoop.java:407) at io.netty.util.concurrent.SingleThreadEventExecutor$4.run(SingleThreadEventExecutor.java:997) at io.netty.util.internal.ThreadExecutorMap$2.run(ThreadExecutorMap.java:74) at io.netty.util.concurrent.FastThreadLocalRunnable.run(FastThreadLocalRunnable.java:30) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:840) Suppressed: java.lang.Exception: #block terminated with an error at reactor.core.publisher.BlockingSingleSubscriber.blockingGet(BlockingSingleSubscriber.java:103) at reactor.core.publisher.Mono.block(Mono.java:1728) at org.springframework.boot.actuate.autoconfigure.tracing.zipkin.ZipkinWebClientSender$WebClientHttpPostCall.doExecute(ZipkinWebClientSender.java:76) at org.springframework.boot.actuate.autoconfigure.tracing.zipkin.ZipkinWebClientSender$WebClientHttpPostCall.doExecute(ZipkinWebClientSender.java:54) at zipkin2.Call$Base.execute(Call.java:391) at zipkin2.reporter.AsyncReporter$BoundedAsyncReporter.flush(AsyncReporter.java:299) at zipkin2.reporter.AsyncReporter$Flusher.run(AsyncReporter.java:378) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:840) Caused by: io.netty.channel.AbstractChannel$AnnotatedConnectException: finishConnect(..) failed: Connection refused: localhost/127.0.0.1:9411 Caused by: java.net.ConnectException: finishConnect(..) failed: Connection refused at io.netty.channel.unix.Errors.newConnectException0(Errors.java:166) at io.netty.channel.unix.Errors.handleConnectErrno(Errors.java:131) at io.netty.channel.unix.Socket.finishConnect(Socket.java:359) at io.netty.channel.epoll.AbstractEpollChannel$AbstractEpollUnsafe.doFinishConnect(AbstractEpollChannel.java:710) at io.netty.channel.epoll.AbstractEpollChannel$AbstractEpollUnsafe.finishConnect(AbstractEpollChannel.java:687) at io.netty.channel.epoll.AbstractEpollChannel$AbstractEpollUnsafe.epollOutReady(AbstractEpollChannel.java:567) at io.netty.channel.epoll.EpollEventLoop.processReady(EpollEventLoop.java:499) at io.netty.channel.epoll.EpollEventLoop.run(EpollEventLoop.java:407) at io.netty.util.concurrent.SingleThreadEventExecutor$4.run(SingleThreadEventExecutor.java:997) at io.netty.util.internal.ThreadExecutorMap$2.run(ThreadExecutorMap.java:74) at io.netty.util.concurrent.FastThreadLocalRunnable.run(FastThreadLocalRunnable.java:30) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:840)
2026-05-16T01:27:43.193Z INFO 1 --- [api-gateway] [trap-executor-0] [ ] c.n.d.s.r.aws.ConfigClusterResolver : Resolving eureka endpoints via configuration " not to contain: "Connection refused"

testcase.name: K8s Service 端點解析正常
